steps.title: Find the shared book feature
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between the two books. The notes say both Tales from Outer Suburbia and Tales from the Inner City describe surreal events occurring in otherwise ordinary settings.

steps.title: Choose the similarity
steps.content: Choice A emphasizes a difference in story count. Choice B gives publication dates, not a shared content feature. Choice C uses Unlike to contrast suburban and urban settings. The choice saying both books describe surreal events in ordinary places matches the goal. The answer is D.
